---
title: "Gene Set Enrichment Analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

Which processes are involved in L/R asymmetry, regardless of which side is higher

```{r ranked by absolute effect size}
library(fgsea)
library(dplyr)
library(biomaRt)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)

run_tissue_gsea <- function(species_name, organ_name, data, go_cache) {
  
  organ_data <- data %>%
    filter(species == species_name, organ == organ_name, variable == "side") %>%
    filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange), is.finite(log2FoldChange), !is.na(padj)) %>% 
    group_by(gene) %>%
    summarise(
      log2FC = mean(log2FoldChange, na.rm = TRUE),
      padj   = mean(padj, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(abs_log2FC = abs(log2FC))
  
  if (nrow(organ_data) < 100) return(NULL)
  
  # sort by absolute log2FC and padj
  ranks <- organ_data %>%
    arrange(desc(abs_log2FC), padj) %>%       
    mutate(abs_log2FC = abs_log2FC + 
             runif(n(), -1e-10, 1e-10)) %>%      # tiny jitter as last resort
    dplyr::select(gene, abs_log2FC) %>%
    deframe()
  
  # Use cached GO annotations
  go_data <- go_cache[[species_name]] %>%
    filter(ensembl_gene_id %in% names(ranks))
  
  if (nrow(go_data) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  pathways <- go_data %>%
    filter(namespace_1003 == "biological_process",
           go_id != "", name_1006 != "") %>%
    group_by(name_1006) %>%
    summarise(genes = list(unique(ensembl_gene_id)), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(lengths(genes) >= 15, lengths(genes) <= 500) %>%
    deframe()
  
  gsea_result <- fgsea(
    pathways  = pathways,
    stats     = ranks,
    minSize   = 15,
    maxSize   = 500,
    scoreType = "pos",
    nPermSimple = 10000,
    eps = 0.0
  )
  
  gsea_result$species <- species_name
  gsea_result$organ   <- organ_name
  return(gsea_result)
}
```


```{r}
all_results <- bind_rows(
  readRDS("bgee_gtex_combined_model_results.rds"),
  readRDS("results_mouse.rds"),
  readRDS("results_pig.rds"),
)

species_organs <- all_results %>%
  filter(variable == "side") %>%
  distinct(species, organ)
```


```{r}
# Pre-fetch GO annotations for all 3 species ONCE before the loop
go_cache <- list()
dataset_map <- c(
  "Homo_sapiens" = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl",
  "Mus_musculus" = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl",
  "Sus_scrofa"   = "sscrofa_gene_ensembl"
)

for (sp in names(dataset_map)) {
  mart      <- useEnsembl("genes", dataset = dataset_map[sp], mirror  = "useast")
  all_genes <- all_results %>% filter(species == sp) %>% pull(gene) %>% unique()
  
  batch_size <- 5000
  n_batches  <- ceiling(length(all_genes) / batch_size)
  go_batches <- list()
  
  for (i in 1:n_batches) {
    batch_genes  <- all_genes[((i-1)*batch_size + 1) : min(i*batch_size, length(all_genes))]
    go_batches[[i]] <- getBM(
      attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "go_id", "name_1006", "namespace_1003"),
      filters    = "ensembl_gene_id",
      values     = batch_genes,
      mart       = mart
    )
  }
  go_cache[[sp]] <- bind_rows(go_batches)
  message(sp, ": ", nrow(go_cache[[sp]]), " GO annotations fetched")
}

```


```{r run for all tissues}
all_tissue_gsea <- list()
for (i in 1:nrow(species_organs)) {
  result <- tryCatch(
    run_tissue_gsea(species_organs$species[i], 
                    species_organs$organ[i], 
                    all_results,
                    go_cache),  
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (!is.null(result)) all_tissue_gsea[[i]] <- result
}

all_tissue_gsea <- all_tissue_gsea[!sapply(all_tissue_gsea, is.null)]
all_gsea <- bind_rows(all_tissue_gsea)

all_gsea_save <- all_gsea %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.list), ~ sapply(., function(x) paste(x, collapse = ";"))))
write.csv(all_gsea_save, "31-03-tissue_specific_gsea.csv", row.names = FALSE)

nrow(all_gsea)
sum(all_gsea$padj < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)
```
